pages.text: A Pickaxe made from $(l:resources/koboldite)Koboldite$(/l) is a very robust and reliable tool, but remains quite mundane in the hands of a Player. When given to a $(l:creatures/hobgoblin)Hobgoblin$(/l) its true properties become evident, slicing through materials like they were liquid.

Additionally, ores mined by Hobgoblins wielding the Koboldite Pickaxe are autosmelted, often at an increased yield. There is also a boost in the drop rate of $(l:resources/koboldite#dust)Koboldite Dust$(/l).
